subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Ram Zamir
body:
Hi Ram Zamir,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at Tel Aviv University. Would love to swap notes on GTM, Revops, Saas, Crm, Ai, Sales, Marketing, Founder.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]

follow-up in Gmail. Human reviews/polishes in Gmail, then sends.
